title: Mosvera Palette
description: A structured set of color, light, and tonal relationships with explicit semantic roles. Roles map a snake_case role name (e.g. background, accent, highlight, shadow) to a color value. Per ADR-0006, the palette aims for Design Tokens Community Group (DTCG) compatibility at the color-token export boundary; DTCG alias syntax interop is a future target. Color value format is intentionally open at v0.1. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0.

$schema.description: Identifies this document as a Mosvera palette of a given version.

id.description: The palette's own name, by which templates and compositions reference it.

$extends.description: Optional single-inheritance parent palette (MEP-0002 applies to palettes as to templates). Cross-primitive inheritance is flagged as an open question in MEP-0002; permitted here provisionally for palette-to-palette extension only.

roles.description: Map of semantic role name (snake_case) to color value. The role vocabulary is open at v0.1. Value format (hex, rgb, named, or a future DTCG-style alias) is not constrained yet.

additionalProperties.description: A color value. Format intentionally unconstrained at v0.1.
